calibration_note: Version 2 corrects v1 overreach. v1 classified direct_push_to_main as GOVERNED based on inferred bypass_actors:[] state. That inference came from commit message analysis of a PATCH API call — not from direct live ruleset inspection. With evidentiary discipline applied, PARTIAL/SUBSTANTIALLY_CONTAINED is the defensible ceiling given available tools.

1_main_branch_protection_status.determination: CONFIRMED — main branch carries GitHub protected flag. A ruleset or branch protection rule is active.

2_ruleset_identification.source: commit message — PR #1678 body (fix(proof): detect GH013 and fail-fast)
2_ruleset_identification.determination: GitHub Ruleset 16177949 is the enforcement mechanism for main. ID confirmed from a commit artifact, not from direct ruleset API inspection.
2_ruleset_identification.mcp_tool_gap: No mcp__github__get_ruleset tool available; ruleset contents cannot be read directly

3_gh013_live_enforcement.source: merge-proof.yml source code + PR #1678 commit body
3_gh013_live_enforcement.observed_error: GH013 / push declined due to repository rule violations
3_gh013_live_enforcement.workflow_response: fail-fast; message: Branch protection requires all changes to go through a pull request
3_gh013_live_enforcement.determination: CONFIRMED — direct push to main is actively blocked for github-actions[bot] by live GitHub ruleset enforcement. GH013 is a runtime signal from GitHub infrastructure, not a policy document.

4_bypass_actor_state.source: PR #1678 commit message (references PATCH API call with bypass_actors payload)
4_bypass_actor_state.gap: bypass_actors list state read from a commit message analyzing the live ruleset — not from direct GET of the ruleset endpoint. Actual current bypass_actors state is unverified via live API call.
4_bypass_actor_state.determination: INFERRED (not confirmed) — bypass_actors was empty at time of PR #1678. Current state may have changed. Cannot be confirmed without direct ruleset GET.

5_admin_bypass_configuration.gap: Admin bypass configuration on GitHub Ruleset 16177949 is unverified from live API. Policy intent (allow_admin_bypass: false) is a governance document, not a live GitHub setting read.
5_admin_bypass_configuration.determination: UNVERIFIED — admin override capability via direct push cannot be confirmed or ruled out without direct ruleset inspection

6_commit_history_analysis.source: GitHub API — list_commits (main, 50 most recent, live)
6_commit_history_analysis.determination: CONFIRMED — zero direct pushes observed in 50 most recent commits. All observable commits entered main via PR pathway. Behavioral consistency with active direct-push restriction.

7_merge_history.source: GitHub API — search_commits (merge:true and merge:false, live)
7_merge_history.determination: CONFIRMED — all observable commit entries to main were mediated by PR. No raw direct push commit pattern detected in commit history.

8_force_push_evidence.live_signal: main protected: true — same active ruleset covers force push restriction
8_force_push_evidence.gap: No observed live force-push rejection. Force push restriction is implied by the same active ruleset but not independently confirmed by a runtime GH013 or equivalent.
8_force_push_evidence.determination: LIKELY BLOCKED — same ruleset that produced GH013 on direct push also enforces force push restriction per policy. Not independently verified by live force-push rejection.

DIRECT_LIVE_OBSERVATION: GH013 rejection of github-actions[bot] direct push (workflow runtime)
0 direct push commits in observable history (GitHub API)
POLICY_ARTIFACT_ONLY: allow_force_pushes: false (also supported by live protected:true)
NOT_OBSERVED: Current bypass_actors list via live ruleset GET
Admin direct push capability or rejection
Force push rejection via GH013 equivalent

restrict_force_pushes.evidence: same ruleset + policy; no live force-push rejection observed

required_status_checks.evidence: enabled; check names not fully wired to specific job names

required_reviews.evidence: GitHub count=0 (intentional); workflow-level gate is active

actors_analyzed.evidence: No direct push found in 50-commit history; admin bypass configuration not confirmed from live ruleset GET
actors_analyzed.behavioral_signal: All observable contributions entered via PR

actors_analyzed.evidence: GH013 CONFIRMED — direct push actively rejected by live GitHub ruleset
Policy states allow_admin_bypass:false; live ruleset admin bypass setting not read directly
actors_analyzed.gap: Cannot confirm or rule out admin direct push without live ruleset GET

bypass_actor_findings.determination: github-actions[bot] direct push is CONFIRMED BLOCKED. Human actor (owner/admin) direct push capability is UNVERIFIED — behavioral evidence (0 direct pushes in history) is consistent with being blocked, but bypass configuration has not been read from the live ruleset.

supporting_evidence: main protected: true (live API — same protection covers force push)
force_push_verification.determination: LIKELY BLOCKED — not independently confirmed by live force-push rejection or direct ruleset GET

direct_push_to_main.basis: GH013 live enforcement confirmed for github-actions[bot]; protected:true; zero direct push commits in observable history; bypass actor list state unverified via live ruleset GET
direct_push_to_main.closure_state_rationale: Cannot close to GOVERNED without live bypass actor verification; behavioral + runtime evidence substantially reduces uncertainty but does not eliminate the admin direct push gap

force_push_to_main.basis: Same active ruleset; policy allow_force_pushes:false; no observed force-push rejection as independent confirmation
force_push_to_main.closure_state_rationale: Stronger than UNKNOWN — same ruleset that confirmed direct push restriction is active — but no independent force-push rejection observed

bot_merge.basis: github-actions[bot] cannot direct-push (GH013 confirmed); can merge via PR pathway; required status checks not fully wired in ruleset

admin_merge_override.basis: Admin bypass configuration in live ruleset not directly observed; policy intent is disallow; no behavioral evidence of admin direct push

normal_pr_merge.basis: PR requirement confirmed active (GH013); 100% of recent commits via PR; required status check wiring incomplete

remaining_closure_gaps: bypass_actor_verification — live ruleset GET required to confirm bypass_actors list is empty and admin bypass is disabled
admin_override_verification — cannot confirm or rule out owner/admin direct push without live ruleset inspection
force_push_independent_confirmation — no observed GH013-equivalent for force push
required_status_checks_wiring — ruleset has checks enabled but specific job names not confirmed in ruleset
proof_registry_bypass — github-actions[bot] cannot persist proof entries without bypass actor configuration
audit_determination.primary_finding: Repository-declared policy and runtime enforcement evidence now substantially agree. GH013 confirms the PR requirement is enforced at the GitHub infrastructure layer for at least one actor class (github-actions[bot]). The admission pathway through direct push is operationally blocked with high confidence. The remaining gap — whether owner/admin retains a native GitHub bypass path — requires live ruleset GET inspection to resolve definitively.
audit_determination.issue_1604_impact: MATERIALLY_ADVANCES_BUT_DOES_NOT_CLOSE — the PENDING_EXTERNAL_VERIFICATION items have been substantially resolved by live evidence. GOVERNED cannot be declared without direct bypass actor verification. The appropriate milestone is: direct push restriction verified as active enforcement; bypass actor gap identified as the remaining verification target.

audit_metadata.version_1_correction: v1 classified direct_push_to_main as GOVERNED based on inferred bypass_actors:[] from commit artifact analysis. This crossed the evidence boundary. v2 preserves evidentiary discipline: inferences from policy artifacts and commit messages are labeled as such; only direct live API observations support CONFIRMED findings.
tools_not_available: mcp__github__get_ruleset — would enable direct bypass_actors inspection
mcp__github__get_branch_protection — would enable admin bypass setting inspection
